string 2: ...Kuga! Calm yourself. The settings are incorrect!
I-I'm sorry, Dr. Simmons!
Hmm? It's you! And what are you doing here?

I'm afraid I don't have time to explain, but... we need to
get to the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building!

Well, it seems you're acting under some extraordinary
circumstances. But, as you can see, that's true of us, too.

You saw that horde of Digimon, right? Common sense should
tell us it would be outrageous to go to that building now.

But of course... common sense isn't everything. I, for one,
exist far outside the bounds of mere common sense!

If we can activate this device, it may become possible to
reach the government building.
{next}What is this thing...?

Curious, are you? Want to know more about this beautiful
machine? Go on. Admit it. I know it's true.

This device will create a powerful barrier field of
electromagnetic waves that will immobilize Digimon.

We'll seal off Shinjuku with this electromagnetic net generator.
Hah! I didn't think I'd be able to put my research to use so soon!

Once it's activated, it'll stop the Digimon's movements and
allow us to get to the government building... right?

Right. You should be able to go through the park... if
we get all the generators to work, that is...

We're having issues because we had to rush preparations.
Public safety is doing their best but it's not looking good.

Since I can't leave, I'll need you to take care of it. There are 
three more generators that haven't been activated yet.

The cause of the trouble appears to be a lack of power.
Here, these batteries should solve the problem.

I wish a public safety officer could accompany you, but they have
their hands full. So at least take this Digimon along.

Don't be alarmed. This one's friendly. You guys have
met before, right?

After many attempts to communicate, we've finally grown close
and they assist me in my research. They'll help you too.

Okay, you caught me. I guess I can't conceal anything from
the eyes of a well-trained agent.

As you can see, I can't stop shaking. I won't deny that
half of me is terrified of this situation...

...but the other half is super excited. I can't wait to
test these generators... the fruits of my research!

Anyway, we have to get all the generators activated. First off, 
head for the back alleys beyond the theater square.
What's the status on that generator?!

It won't start, sir. Regular batteries don't seem to be
sufficient to power it.

So much for the blockade... We can't just let those
monsters out into the world!
Is everything all right?!

Wh-What the...? You kids need to leave this area
immediately!

We were told to come here by Dr. Simmons. We're helping her
activate the device.
But you're civilians! Has she lost her mind?!

Incoming message from Dr. Simmons! She says she gave the
batteries to these kids here, so get one from them.

She says... That she gave the battery to those three, and to take it off
their hands.

She also says that they'll take care of activating the remaining
generators, so point them in the right direction.
I want you to take this battery.{next}
Where should we go next?

Orders from the doctor or no, I can't send you children
into danger.

If anything ever happened to you... I'd never be able to
look your father in the eye again.
Thinking about what he was going through when he turned in his badge...
Your old man was a colleague of mine, you see.
You worked with my dad...?
That's right. The name's Kuremi.
I have a daughter around your age, myself.

Pretty much every father in the world would say that their
children matter more to them than their own life.

Hey, I've got tons of stories about your dad... but this is
no time for reminiscing. Your safety takes priority.
Right now, you folks need to clear out of here, and fast!

My mother and brother died because of a Digimon conflict.
I can't just sit back while the same thing is happening again!

Your father had that same expression when he left public
safety. I begged him to reconsider, but he was determined.

Whew... Well, I guess it's safer to work together than to
have you guys wander around on your own.
Give them directions.
Asking civilians for aid yet again...
Guess I have no choice... Listen up. There are two more inert devices.

The voltage won't stabilize unless we activate all of the devices at the
same time, which means no working electromagnetic net.

I'm sending you the coordinates now. Head to the Shinjuku
underground first.

To tell the truth, some of our people went down there a little while ago,
but we've since lost contact with them.
But we haven't heard back in a while.

Wow, I hope they're all right... Okay, we'll head to the
underground right away.
Hey, look at that!
The treasure!

This belongs to us! The likes of you shall never lay a
finger on— Urgh?!
What?!
Why... will it not... do as we will it to?!
Stay back, Inori! Something's wrong!
That's odd...

This level of disturbance should've been more widely
reported around the world.

At this rate... Shinjuku's destruction could happen even
sooner than eight years from now.
Could it be... that our actions have rewritten history...?
That we've somehow made our fate even worse...?

Wh-What's wrong? You look like you're in pain... Are you
hurt or something?
I couldn't change the future for the better...
Global collapse is inevitable now...
What did I even travel through time for...?
What in the world are you talking about?
You see, the future is...
You see, the world is...
You see, humanity is...
The "Shinjuku Inferno"...?
So, you're telling us that... infighting between Digimon...
...Is going to destroy the world...?
Wait...
So are you saying that...?
...You're from the future...?!
Whew...

Digimon, the Digital World, and someone from the future...
Nothing can surprise me anymore.

I mean... just think of the journey the three of us have
been on.
You're right.
And maybe this makes our goal a little clearer, too.

To change the future... That's the reason I gotta become a
hero!

That's right. So {player}... there's no need to shoulder
this alone, you know.

I have to say... it makes me a little sad that you were
hiding something so important from us.
I mean, come on... We aren't just a group of strangers here, right?
If you're dealing with something... we'll face it with you!

So no more secrets, okay? We want to be right by your
side to help.

After all, that's what you've been doing for us this whole
time... Right, Aegiomon?
That's right! You can count on us!
... Thank you, really.

So Titamon absorbed the power of the treasure, huh?
That thing contained Chronomon's abilities...
So the only way to stop Titamon now would be to...
That's odd...

This level of disturbance should've been more widely reported
around the world.

At this rate... Shinjuku's destruction could happen even
sooner than eight years from now.
Could it be... that our actions have rewritten history...?
That we've somehow made our fate even worse...?
Wh-What's wrong?
You look like you're in pain... Are you hurt or something?
Has history changed for the worse...?{next}
Did we speed up global collapse by intervening in the past?{next}
Time travel can't save the world...?{next}
What in the world are you talking about?
You see, the future is...{next}
You see, the world is...{next}
You see, humanity is...{next}
The "Shinjuku Inferno," you say...?
So, you're telling us that... infighting among Digimon...
...Is going to destroy the world...?
Wait...
{player}...
...You're from the future...?!
Whew...

Digimon, the Digital World and someone from the future...
Nothing can surprise me anymore.

I mean... just think of the journey the three of us have
been on!
...I know, right?
And maybe this makes our goal a little clearer, too.

To change the future... That's the reason I gotta become a
hero!

That's right. So, {player}... there's no need to shoulder this alone,
you know.

I have to say... it makes me a little sad that you were
hiding something so important from us.

I mean, come on... We aren't just a group of strangers
here, right?

So no more secrets, you hear? We want to be right by your
side to help.

After all, that's what you've been doing for us this whole
time... Right, Aegiomon?
That's right! You can count on us!
Ungh...!
Gimme back that treasure!
I will not let you have it!

All is clear now... It is just as the great one, Plutomon,
said.
Its identity stands revealed... right before my eyes...
Chronomon... the hero...
...and the bane of all Titans!
Its power is flowing into me...!

Long years of injustice shall now be made right! All by
absorbing this power from its very source!
Graaaaaaaaagh!
Whoa!
Now, let us try this once more!

Experience the power of the "hero" that struck down the
Titans—and the suffering that our ancestors endured!
AAAAAGH! What have you done?!
My control over time...?!

Very well... No more cheap tricks! Now we shall see what you are
really made of!
Stay sharp.

Based on the readings from your Digivice, it's probable that an 
extremely minor space-time disturbance is underway.

The very space-time disturbance that sparked the anomaly
that erased Dr. Yuki, your adoptive father, from existence.

As for the cause... I'd say it's likely the raging conflict
between the phase electron lifeforms—the Digimon.

Little is known about such phenomena. We can only guess they 
are literally disruptions in the laws of time and space.
There's no predicting what will happen if we ignore it!
If we don't do something, Shinjuku is in real trouble.
Inori...
I have so many memories in this city...

The life and energy here even helped cheer me up after
losing my mom and brother.

Inori... I'm so sorry. All of this happened because of
Titamon... no, because of us Digimon...
It was our fault that you lost your family members, too...
You don't need to apologize. After all...
I... don't hold any grudge against Digimon.
I'm truly happy to have met you, Aegiomon.
If I hadn't... I'd probably still be in a very sad place.

I've spent so long hating the past deep in my heart that
I... I don't want to hate anything ever again.

I want to hold on to how I feel now. These emotions, the
part of me that cares for you...
...I never want them to be drowned out by dark thoughts.
Inori...
If I have to hate anything... I think it should be "conflict."
Conflict... robs people of those they care about.
...I think I get it.
In that case, let's put a stop to it ourselves.
Let's end this conflict!
Grrrgh!
You impudent... little brat...!
Hnnnnngh!
Hnh!
Hrrrrrrrgh...!
Hngh! Hrrrrrrrgh...! Aaaaaaagh!
Oh...

The space-time disturbance is growing rapidly! It's too dangerous
to remain in your current location! Get out of there!
Hrrrrrrraaaaaaagh...!
Raaaaaaaaaaaaaaagh!
The power of the treasure is... Out of control...?
No!
Aegiomon! What are you...?!
The power of the treasure is the power of the hero, Chronomon!
If I really am Chronomon reborn, like everyone says...
...then I should be able to handle the power, even if it's out of control!
Chro...no...mon...?
